programs.title: Live: CBC Toronto News
programs.desc: Dwight Drummond and team take a comprehensive look at the top stories, with breaking news, reports and updates relevant to the city of Toronto.

programs.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programs.desc: The Canadiens play the Sabres in the East second round Game 1 at KeyBank Center. Buffalo reached the second round for the first time since 2007 by beating Boston 4-2, while Montreal advanced by defeating Tampa Bay in a seven-game series.

programs.title: Son of a Critch
programs.desc: Mark is devastated to learn Fox found a new boyfriend over the summer; Mike Jr. struggles to tell his dad that he dropped out of school.

programs.title: The National
programs.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programs.title: Live: CBC Toronto News at 11
programs.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programs.title: Land and Sea
programs.desc: Summer and fall of 2025 brought drought and forest fires to Newfoundland and Labrador; towns are becoming more and more worried about water; well talk about the impacts of dryness.
